# Smart Search 0.2.0

This release establishes the fork-owned npm package
`@shirlytaylor73/smart-search` and introduces the provider-independent CLI
contract.

## User-visible changes

- Query operations are organized as `search answer|sources|similar`.
- Technical documentation and repository operations use `docs search`,
  `docs resolve`, `docs tree`, and `docs read`.
- Known URL retrieval uses `fetch content` or `fetch extract`.
- Website structure discovery uses `map site`.
- Provider selection and fallback are controlled by operation configuration
  rather than Agent-facing provider flags.
- AnySearch and the built-in Deep Research commands were removed.
- The npm distribution remains a wrapper around the bundled Python CLI.

## npm migration

Uninstall the upstream package before installing this fork because both
packages expose the `smart-search` executable:

```bash
npm uninstall -g @konbakuyomu/smart-search
npm install -g @shirlytaylor73/smart-search@latest
smart-search -v
```
